title: bupleurum perfoliatum var. rotuncifolium
intro: Bupleurum perfoliatum var. rotuncifolium, also known as the Bupleurum, is a type of flowering plant in the family Apiaceae, commonly found in Asia and Europe. The medicinal properties of Bupleurum are attributed to its alkaloid and glycoside content, which have been used to treat various health conditions for centuries. The plant is known for its health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and immunomodulatory effects, which can help to reduce fever, alleviate joint pain, and boost the immune system. Bupleurum is typically prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat conditions such as rheumatism, bronchitis, and asthma.
